race.description: Memorial Race Day 10th April B60 Handicap
race.comment: DECIMUS (1) settled well back then made some inroads and finished 5.5 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1200m at Toowoomba two weeks ago as $2.2 favourite. Steps up in journey today. Won't find this as tough and will prove hard to stop. TOBA (6) progressed nicely last time out to finish just half a length from the winner in second over 1400m at this track after being prominent at the corner. Best figures measure up and is sure to run well. LISSARO (10) worked home well and finished third last time over 1400m at Gold Coast, beaten 2 lengths. Tackling a more suitable race this time so he is perfectly placed to score. REGGAE FIRE (2) was in the money last start when second at Dalby over 1400m on a soft track and should be at his top. Ready to win and expected to go close.
